title: CellularSection
description: CellularSection: Steel section to be used on Bars. Defined by a SectionProfile.

Name.description: A unique name is required for some structural packages to create and identify the object.

Fabrication.description: The fabrication method used for the section.

PlateRestraint.description: Defines whether any of the plates of the section have any external restraint, from for example a connecting slab.

Material.description: Homogeneous material used throughout the full section. IMaterialFragment: Base interface for structural materials used by structural properties or as a fragment of the physical material.

SectionProfile.description: Profile of the section through the point of the largest opening, containing dimensions and section geometry. IProfile: Base interface for all shape profiles.

SolidProfile.description: The profile at a cut through the solid section. ISectionProfile: I-shaped profile with parallel flanges with equal thickness.

BaseProfile.description: The IShape from which the cellular beam was cut. ISectionProfile: I-shaped profile with parallel flanges with equal thickness.

Area.description: Area of the cross section through the section with the largest opening. Property has a quantity of type Area measured in [m²].

Rgy.description: Radius of gyration about the local Y-Axis as the arithmetic mean between the solid and open parts of the section. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Rgz.description: Radius of gyration about the local Z-Axis through the section with the largest opening. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

J.description: Torsion Constant through the section with the largest opening. Property has a quantity of type TorsionConstant measured in [m⁴].

Iy.description: Moment of Inertia about the local Y-Axis as the arithmetic mean between the solid and open parts of the section. Property has a quantity of type SecondMomentOfArea measured in [m⁴].

Iz.description: Moment of Inertia about the local Z-Axis through the section with the largest opening. Property has a quantity of type SecondMomentOfArea measured in [m⁴].

Iw.description: Warping Constant through the section with the largest opening. Property has a quantity of type WarpingConstant measured in [m⁶].

Wely.description: Elastic Modulus of the section about the local Y-Axis through the section with the largest opening. Property has a quantity of type SectionModulus measured in [m³].

Welz.description: Elastic Modulus of the section about the local Z-Axis through the section with the largest opening. Property has a quantity of type SectionModulus measured in [m³].

Wply.description: Plastic Modulus of the section about the local Y-Axis through the section with the largest opening. Property has a quantity of type SectionModulus measured in [m³].

Wplz.description: Plastic Modulus of the section about the local Z-Axis through the section with the largest opening. Property has a quantity of type SectionModulus measured in [m³].

CentreZ.description: Geometric centre of the section in the local Z direction. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

CentreY.description: Geometric centre of the section in the local Y direction. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Vz.description: Z distance from the centroid of the section to top edge of the section. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Vpz.description: Z distance from the centroid of the section to bottom edge of the section. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Vy.description: Y distance from the centroid of the section to right edge of the section. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Vpy.description: Y distance from the centroid of the section to Left edge of the section. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Asy.description: Shear Area in the local Y direction through the section with the largest opening. Only acounts for contributions from the flanges. Property has a quantity of type Area measured in [m²].

Asz.description: Shear Area in the local Z direction through the section with the largest opening. Only acounts for contributions from the uncut parts of the web. Property has a quantity of type Area measured in [m²].

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
